events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need determine compliance for roofing commercial project, observed nail placement high/exposed. Work rough-complete. Reference IRC R905, mfr specs. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Nail placement high/exposed likely means roofing nails placed too high on shingle, exposed, not covered by next course. This violates manufacturer specs and IRC R905.2.6.1? For asphalt shingles, nails shall be driven flush and not cut into shingle, located per manufacturer. Exposed nails can leak, wind uplift. So fail. Risk high? Exposed nails compromise water barrier and wind resistance; could cause leaks and blow-offs. High. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 85? Value 0. Sound etc default 0/empty. Findings: nails exposed/high, improper fastening. Actions: remove/replace fasteners, seal? Corrective action: replace affected shingles, renail per manufacturer at proper location, inspect entire roof. Rationale: exposed nails violate IRC and manufacturer fastening requirements, create water intrusion and wind uplift risk. References: IRC R905.2.6.1 (or R905.2.6?), manufacturer specs. Need JSON shape exact.
